name: SubjectHub conflates 'no chapters at all' with 'no search results'
description: [FCR 2026-06-21 · L6-03] zero-chapter subject shows 'No results' for a search the user never ran, with no CTA. Fix: branch on chapters.length===0 (true-empty CTA) vs filtered-empty.
acceptanceCriteria: Root cause: SubjectHub renders subjectHub.search.noResults whenever filteredChapters.length === 0, without distinguishing data.chapters.length === 0 from an active search/filter miss. Variants: (1) true-empty subject with no chapters; (2) non-empty subject where the current search returns no matching chapters. Regression test: apps/mobile/src/components/subject-hub/SubjectHub.test.tsx covers both variants, fails without the fix, and proves true-empty shows an appropriate empty/CTA state while filtered-empty keeps the no-results copy.
